_comment: Schema for knowledge/discovery-log.json entries. Each session appends one entry.

targets.strategy: [which of the 10 Scout strategies produced this target]

productive_bridges: bridges that led to surviving hypotheses
surviving_hypotheses: titles of hypotheses that passed quality gate

_purpose: Reusing productive bridge concepts in future sessions
Preventing regeneration of previously killed hypotheses
Strategy performance metrics consumed by Scout (via meta-insights.md) and Session Analyst
